words.exampleArabic: كَتَبَ رَئِيسُ التَّحْرِيرِ افْتِتَاحِيَّةً حَوْلَ الأَزْمَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Glavni urednik je napisao uvodnik o krizi.
words.exampleEn: The editor-in-chief wrote an editorial about the crisis.

words.exampleArabic: أَصْدَرَتِ الشَّرِكَةُ بَيَانًا صَحَفِيًّا عَنْ نَتَائِجِهَا.
words.exampleBs: Kompanija je izdala saopštenje za javnost o rezultatima.
words.exampleEn: The company issued a press release about its results.

words.exampleArabic: كَشَفَتِ الصِّحَافَةُ الاسْتِقْصَائِيَّةُ عَنْ قَضِيَّةِ فَسَادٍ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživačko novinarstvo otkrilo je slučaj korupcije.
words.exampleEn: Investigative journalism uncovered a corruption case.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَقَدَ الْبَاحِثُونَ الانْحِيَازَ الإِعْلَامِيَّ فِي تَغْطِيَةِ الأَحْدَاثِ.
words.exampleBs: Istraživači su kritizirali medijsku pristrasnost u pokrivanju događaja.
words.exampleEn: Researchers criticized media bias in the coverage of events.

words.exampleArabic: تَفْرِضُ بَعْضُ الْحُكُومَاتِ الرَّقَابَةَ عَلَى وَسَائِلِ الإِعْلَامِ.
words.exampleBs: Neke vlade nameću cenzuru medijima.
words.exampleEn: Some governments impose censorship on the media.

words.exampleArabic: تُعَدُّ حُرِّيَّةُ الصَّحَافَةِ رُكِيزَةً أَسَاسِيَّةً لِلدِّيمُقْرَاطِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Sloboda štampe smatra se ključnim stubom demokratije.
words.exampleEn: Freedom of the press is considered a fundamental pillar of democracy.

words.exampleArabic: حَصَلَتِ الْقَنَاةُ عَلَى مُقَابَلَةٍ مُنْفَرِدَةٍ مَعَ الرَّئِيسِ.
words.exampleBs: Kanal je dobio ekskluzivni intervju s predsjednikom.
words.exampleEn: The channel obtained an exclusive interview with the president.

words.exampleArabic: وَقَّعَتِ الدَّوْلَتَانِ مُعَاهَدَةَ سَلَامٍ.
words.exampleBs: Dvije države su potpisale mirovni sporazum.
words.exampleEn: The two states signed a peace treaty.

words.exampleArabic: فَرَضَتِ الدُّوَلُ الْغَرْبِيَّةُ عُقُوبَاتٍ اقْتِصَادِيَّةً.
words.exampleBs: Zapadne zemlje su nametnule ekonomske sankcije.
words.exampleEn: Western countries imposed economic sanctions.

words.exampleArabic: أَجْرَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ اسْتِفْتَاءً حَوْلَ الدُّسْتُورِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada je provela referendum o ustavu.
words.exampleEn: The government held a referendum on the constitution.

words.exampleArabic: شَكَّلَتِ الأَحْزَابُ الثَّلَاثَةُ ائْتِلَافًا حَاكِمًا.
words.exampleBs: Tri stranke su formirale vladajuću koaliciju.
words.exampleEn: The three parties formed a ruling coalition.

words.exampleArabic: رَفَضَتِ الْمُعَارَضَةُ مَشْرُوعَ الْقَانُونِ.
words.exampleBs: Opozicija je odbila nacrt zakona.
words.exampleEn: The opposition rejected the draft law.

words.exampleArabic: قَطَعَتِ الدَّوْلَتَانِ الْعَلَاقَاتِ الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةَ.
words.exampleBs: Dvije države su prekinule diplomatske odnose.
words.exampleEn: The two states severed diplomatic relations.

words.exampleArabic: تُرَاقِبُ مُنَظَّمَاتٌ دَوْلِيَّةٌ حُقُوقَ الإِنْسَانِ.
words.exampleBs: Međunarodne organizacije prate ljudska prava.
words.exampleEn: International organizations monitor human rights.

words.exampleArabic: ارْتَفَعَ التَّضَخُّمُ بِشَكْلٍ حَادٍّ الشَّهْرَ الْمَاضِيَ.
words.exampleBs: Inflacija je naglo porasla prošlog mjeseca.
words.exampleEn: Inflation rose sharply last month.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الْحُكُومَةُ إِلَى خَفْضِ نِسْبَةِ الْبَطَالَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada nastoji smanjiti stopu nezaposlenosti.
words.exampleEn: The government seeks to reduce the unemployment rate.

words.exampleArabic: أَعْلَنَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ عَنِ ارْتِفَاعِ الْعَجْزِ التِّجَارِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Vlada je objavila porast trgovinskog deficita.
words.exampleEn: The government announced an increase in the trade deficit.

words.exampleArabic: سَجَّلَ الاقْتِصَادُ نُمُوًّا مُلْحُوظًا هَذَا الْعَامَ.
words.exampleBs: Ekonomija je ove godine zabilježila primjetan rast.
words.exampleEn: The economy recorded notable growth this year.

words.exampleArabic: انْخَفَضَ مُؤَشِّرُ سُوقِ الأَوْرَاقِ الْمَالِيَّةِ أَمْسِ.
words.exampleBs: Indeks berze je jučer pao.
words.exampleEn: The stock market index fell yesterday.

words.exampleArabic: تَسْعَى الدَّوْلَةُ لِجَذْبِ الاسْتِثْمَارِ الأَجْنَبِيِّ.
words.exampleBs: Država nastoji privući strane investicije.
words.exampleEn: The state seeks to attract foreign investment.

words.exampleArabic: تَمَسَّكَتِ الأَطْرَافُ بِوَقْفِ إِطْلَاقِ النَّارِ.
words.exampleBs: Strane su se pridržavale primirja.
words.exampleEn: The parties adhered to the ceasefire.

words.exampleArabic: بَدَأَتِ الْمُفَاوَضَاتُ بَيْنَ الطَّرَفَيْنِ فِي جِنِيف.
words.exampleBs: Pregovori između dvije strane počeli su u Ženevi.
words.exampleEn: Negotiations between the two sides began in Geneva.

words.exampleArabic: وَصَلَتِ الْمُسَاعَدَاتُ الإِنْسَانِيَّةُ إِلَى الْمُتَضَرِّرِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Humanitarna pomoć stigla je do stradalih.
words.exampleEn: Humanitarian aid reached those affected.

words.exampleArabic: تَكْفَلَتِ الدَّوْلَةُ بِرِعَايَةِ اللَّاجِئِينَ.
words.exampleBs: Država je preuzela brigu o izbjeglicama.
words.exampleEn: The state took responsibility for caring for refugees.

words.exampleArabic: لَا يَسْمَحُ بِدُخُولِ الصَّحَفِيِّينَ إِلَى مِنْطَقَةِ النِّزَاعِ.
words.exampleBs: Novinarima nije dozvoljeno ući u zonu sukoba.
words.exampleEn: Journalists are not permitted to enter the conflict zone.

words.exampleArabic: حَلَّلَ الْخَبِيرُ نَتَائِجَ الانْتِخَابَاتِ.
words.exampleBs: Ekspert je analizirao rezultate izbora.
words.exampleEn: The expert analyzed the election results.

words.exampleArabic: انْتَقَدَتِ الصَّحَافَةُ سِيَاسَةَ الْحُكُومَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Novinari su kritizirali vladinu politiku.
words.exampleEn: The press criticized the government's policy.

words.exampleArabic: حَقَّقَ الصَّحَفِيُّ فِي قَضِيَّةِ الْفَسَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Novinar je istraživao slučaj korupcije.
words.exampleEn: The journalist investigated the corruption case.

words.exampleArabic: كَشَفَ التَّحْقِيقُ عَنْ وَثَائِقَ سِرِّيَّةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Istraga je otkrila tajne dokumente.
words.exampleEn: The investigation revealed secret documents.

words.exampleArabic: اتَّهَمَ الْمُعَارِضُونَ الْوَزِيرَ بِالْفَسَادِ.
words.exampleBs: Oponenti su optužili ministra za korupciju.
words.exampleEn: The opponents accused the minister of corruption.

words.exampleArabic: نَفَى الْمَسْؤُولُ التُّهَمَ الْمُوَجَّهَةَ إِلَيْهِ.
words.exampleBs: Zvaničnik je zanijekao optužbe upućene njemu.
words.exampleEn: The official denied the accusations directed at him.

words.exampleArabic: تَفَاوَضَتِ الأَطْرَافُ لِأَيَّامٍ قَبْلَ التَّوَصُّلِ إِلَى اتِّفَاقٍ.
words.exampleBs: Strane su pregovarale danima prije postizanja dogovora.
words.exampleEn: The parties negotiated for days before reaching an agreement.

words.exampleArabic: يَعْمَلُ الْمُرَاسِلُ الْحَرْبِيُّ فِي ظُرُوفٍ بَالِغَةِ الصُّعُوبَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ratni izvještač radi u izuzetno teškim uvjetima.
words.exampleEn: The war correspondent works in extremely difficult conditions.

words.exampleArabic: حَظِيَ الْحَدَثُ بِتَغْطِيَةٍ إِعْلَامِيَّةٍ وَاسِعَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Događaj je dobio široko medijsko praćenje.
words.exampleEn: The event received extensive media coverage.

words.exampleArabic: رَفَضَ الصَّحَفِيُّ الْكَشْفَ عَنْ مَصْدَرِهِ.
words.exampleBs: Novinar je odbio otkriti svoj izvor.
words.exampleEn: The journalist refused to reveal his source.

words.exampleArabic: حَذَّرَ الْخُبَرَاءُ مِنَ انْتِشَارِ الدِّعَايَةِ الْمُضَلِّلَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Stručnjaci su upozorili na širenje obmanjujuće propagande.
words.exampleEn: Experts warned of the spread of misleading propaganda.

words.exampleArabic: تَنْتَشِرُ الْمَعْلُومَاتُ الْمُضَلِّلَةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ عَلَى وَسَائِلِ التَّوَاصُلِ.
words.exampleBs: Dezinformacije se brzo šire na društvenim mrežama.
words.exampleEn: Disinformation spreads quickly on social media.

words.exampleArabic: أَثَارَ تَسْرِيبُ الْوَثَائِقِ جَدَلًا وَاسِعًا.
words.exampleBs: Curenje dokumenata izazvalo je široku polemiku.
words.exampleEn: The document leak sparked a wide controversy.

words.exampleArabic: طَالَبَ الإِعْلَامُ بِمَزِيدٍ مِنَ الشَّفَافِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Mediji su zahtijevali veću transparentnost.
words.exampleEn: The media demanded greater transparency.

words.exampleArabic: تَأَثَّرَ الرَّأْيُ الْعَامُّ بِالتَّغْطِيَةِ الإِعْلَامِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Javno mišljenje je bilo pod utjecajem medijskog praćenja.
words.exampleEn: Public opinion was influenced by media coverage.

words.exampleArabic: كَشَفَ اسْتِطْلَاعُ الرَّأْيِ عَنِ انْخِفَاضِ شَعْبِيَّةِ الْحُكُومَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Anketa je pokazala pad popularnosti vlade.
words.exampleEn: The opinion poll revealed a drop in the government's popularity.

words.exampleArabic: تُهَيْمِنُ الأَجَنْدَةُ الإِعْلَامِيَّةُ عَلَى النِّقَاشِ الْعَامِّ.
words.exampleBs: Medijska agenda dominira javnom raspravom.
words.exampleEn: The media agenda dominates public discussion.

words.exampleArabic: لَجَأَتِ الدُّوَلُ إِلَى الدِّبْلُومَاسِيَّةِ لِحَلِّ النِّزَاعِ.
words.exampleBs: Države su pribjegle diplomatiji za rješavanje sukoba.
words.exampleEn: The states resorted to diplomacy to resolve the conflict.

words.exampleArabic: انْخَفَضَتْ قِيمَةُ الْعُمْلَةِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ أَمَامَ الدُّولَارِ.
words.exampleBs: Vrijednost lokalne valute je pala u odnosu na dolar.
words.exampleEn: The value of the local currency fell against the dollar.

words.exampleArabic: دَعَتِ الأُمَمُ الْمُتَّحِدَةُ إِلَى التَّدَخُّلِ لِمُعَالَجَةِ الأَزْمَةِ الإِنْسَانِيَّةِ.
words.exampleBs: Ujedinjene nacije su pozvale na intervenciju radi rješavanja humanitarne krize.
words.exampleEn: The United Nations called for intervention to address the humanitarian crisis.

words.exampleArabic: تَوَصَّلَتِ الأَطْرَافُ إِلَى اتِّفَاقٍ بَعْدَ مُفَاوَضَاتٍ مُضْنِيَةٍ.
words.exampleBs: Strane su postigle sporazum nakon iscrpnih pregovora.
words.exampleEn: The parties reached an agreement after exhausting negotiations.

words.exampleArabic: فَنَّدَ الْخَبِيرُ الادِّعَاءَاتِ الْكَاذِبَةَ.
words.exampleBs: Ekspert je pobio lažne tvrdnje.
words.exampleEn: The expert refuted the false claims.

words.exampleArabic: صَرَّحَ الْوَزِيرُ بِأَنَّ الاقْتِصَادَ فِي تَعَافٍ.
words.exampleBs: Ministar je izjavio da je ekonomija u oporavku.
words.exampleEn: The minister declared that the economy is in recovery.

words.exampleArabic: تَدَاوَلَ الْمُوَاطِنُونَ الْخَبَرَ عَبْرَ وَسَائِلِ التَّوَاصُلِ.
words.exampleBs: Građani su dijelili vijest putem društvenih mreža.
words.exampleEn: Citizens circulated the news through social media.

words.exampleArabic: وَثَّقَ الْمُرَاسِلُ الأَحْدَاثَ بِالصُّوَرِ وَالتَّقَارِيرِ.
words.exampleBs: Dopisnik je dokumentovao događaje fotografijama i izvještajima.
words.exampleEn: The correspondent documented the events with photos and reports.

words.exampleArabic: سَرَّبَ مَصْدَرٌ مَجْهُولٌ الْوَثَائِقَ إِلَى الصَّحَافَةِ.
words.exampleBs: Nepoznati izvor je procurio dokumente u štampu.
words.exampleEn: An anonymous source leaked the documents to the press.
